# diffmatchpatch

```go
import "github.com/sergi/go-diff/diffmatchpatch"
```

Package diffmatchpatch offers robust algorithms to perform the operations required for synchronizing plain text.

## Constants

<a name="FOUR_BYTE_BITS"></a>

```go
const FOUR_BYTE_BITS = 21
```

<a name="ONE_BYTE_BITS"></a>These constants define the number of bits representable in 1,2,3,4 byte utf8 sequences, respectively.

```go
const ONE_BYTE_BITS = 7
```

<a name="THREE_BYTE_BITS"></a>

```go
const THREE_BYTE_BITS = 16
```

<a name="TWO_BYTE_BITS"></a>

```go
const TWO_BYTE_BITS = 11
```

<a name="UNICODE_INVALID_RANGE_DELTA"></a>

```go
const UNICODE_INVALID_RANGE_DELTA = UNICODE_INVALID_RANGE_END - UNICODE_INVALID_RANGE_START + 1
```

<a name="UNICODE_INVALID_RANGE_END"></a>

```go
const UNICODE_INVALID_RANGE_END = 0xDFFF
```

<a name="UNICODE_INVALID_RANGE_START"></a>

```go
const UNICODE_INVALID_RANGE_START = 0xD800
```

<a name="UNICODE_RANGE_MAX"></a>

```go
const UNICODE_RANGE_MAX = 0x10FFFF
```

<a name="Diff"></a>

## type [Diff](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L40-L43>)

Diff represents one diff operation

```go
type Diff struct {
    Type Operation
    Text string
}
```

<a name="DiffMatchPatch"></a>

## type [DiffMatchPatch](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diffmatchpatch.go#L17-L32>)

DiffMatchPatch holds the configuration for diff\-match\-patch operations.

```go
type DiffMatchPatch struct {
    // Number of seconds to map a diff before giving up (0 for infinity).
    DiffTimeout time.Duration
    // Cost of an empty edit operation in terms of edit characters.
    DiffEditCost int
    // How far to search for a match (0 = exact location, 1000+ = broad match). A match this many characters away from the expected location will add 1.0 to the score (0.0 is a perfect match).
    MatchDistance int
    // When deleting a large block of text (over ~64 characters), how close do the contents have to be to match the expected contents. (0.0 = perfection, 1.0 = very loose).  Note that MatchThreshold controls how closely the end points of a delete need to match.
    PatchDeleteThreshold float64
    // Chunk size for context length.
    PatchMargin int
    // The number of bits in an int.
    MatchMaxBits int
    // At what point is no match declared (0.0 = perfection, 1.0 = very loose).
    MatchThreshold float64
}
```

<a name="New"></a>

### func [New](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diffmatchpatch.go#L35>)

```go
func New() *DiffMatchPatch
```

New creates a new DiffMatchPatch object with default parameters.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffBisect"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffBisect](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L254>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffBisect(text1, text2 string, deadline time.Time) []Diff
```

DiffBisect finds the 'middle snake' of a diff, split the problem in two and return the recursively constructed diff. If an invalid UTF\-8 sequence is encountered, it will be replaced by the Unicode replacement character. See Myers 1986 paper: An O\(ND\) Difference Algorithm and Its Variations.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffCharsToLines"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffCharsToLines](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L404>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffCharsToLines(diffs []Diff, lineArray []string) []Diff
```

DiffCharsToLines rehydrates the text in a diff from a string of line hashes to real lines of text.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffCleanupEfficiency"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffCleanupEfficiency](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L847>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffCleanupEfficiency(diffs []Diff) []Diff
```

DiffCleanupEfficiency reduces the number of edits by eliminating operationally trivial equalities.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffCleanupMerge"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffCleanupMerge](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L958>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffCleanupMerge(diffs []Diff) []Diff
```

DiffCleanupMerge reorders and merges like edit sections. Merge equalities. Any edit section can move as long as it doesn't cross an equality.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffCleanupSemantic"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffCleanupSemantic](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L606>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffCleanupSemantic(diffs []Diff) []Diff
```

DiffCleanupSemantic reduces the number of edits by eliminating semantically trivial equalities.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffCleanupSemanticLossless"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffCleanupSemanticLossless](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L774>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffCleanupSemanticLossless(diffs []Diff) []Diff
```

DiffCleanupSemanticLossless looks for single edits surrounded on both sides by equalities which can be shifted sideways to align the edit to a word boundary. E.g: The c\<ins\>at c\</ins\>ame. \-\> The \<ins\>cat \</ins\>came.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffCommonOverlap"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffCommonOverlap](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L460>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffCommonOverlap(text1 string, text2 string) int
```

DiffCommonOverlap determines if the suffix of one string is the prefix of another.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffCommonPrefix"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffCommonPrefix](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L421>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffCommonPrefix(text1, text2 string) int
```

DiffCommonPrefix determines the common prefix length of two strings.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffCommonSuffix"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffCommonSuffix](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L427>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffCommonSuffix(text1, text2 string) int
```

DiffCommonSuffix determines the common suffix length of two strings.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffFromDelta"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffFromDelta](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L1261>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffFromDelta(text1 string, delta string) (diffs []Diff, err error)
```

DiffFromDelta given the original text1, and an encoded string which describes the operations required to transform text1 into text2, comAdde the full diff.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffHalfMatch"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffHalfMatch](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L500>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffHalfMatch(text1, text2 string) []string
```

DiffHalfMatch checks whether the two texts share a substring which is at least half the length of the longer text. This speedup can produce non\-minimal diffs.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffLevenshtein"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffLevenshtein](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L1205>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffLevenshtein(diffs []Diff) int
```

DiffLevenshtein computes the Levenshtein distance that is the number of inserted, deleted or substituted characters.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffLinesToChars"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffLinesToChars](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L392>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffLinesToChars(text1, text2 string) (string, string, []string)
```

DiffLinesToChars splits two texts into a list of strings, and educes the texts to a string of hashes where each Unicode character represents one line. It's slightly faster to call DiffLinesToRunes first, followed by DiffMainRunes.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffLinesToRunes"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffLinesToRunes](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L398>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffLinesToRunes(text1, text2 string) ([]rune, []rune, []string)
```

DiffLinesToRunes splits two texts into a list of runes.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffMain"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffMain](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L84>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffMain(text1, text2 string, checklines bool) []Diff
```

DiffMain finds the differences between two texts. If an invalid UTF\-8 sequence is encountered, it will be replaced by the Unicode replacement character.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffMainRunes"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffMainRunes](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L90>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffMainRunes(text1, text2 []rune, checklines bool) []Diff
```

DiffMainRunes finds the differences between two rune sequences. If an invalid UTF\-8 sequence is encountered, it will be replaced by the Unicode replacement character.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffPrettyHtml"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffPrettyHtml](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L1119>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffPrettyHtml(diffs []Diff) string
```

DiffPrettyHtml converts a \[\]Diff into a pretty HTML report. It is intended as an example from which to write one's own display functions.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffPrettyText"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffPrettyText](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L1142>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffPrettyText(diffs []Diff) string
```

DiffPrettyText converts a \[\]Diff into a colored text report.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffText1"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffText1](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L1180>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffText1(diffs []Diff) string
```

DiffText1 computes and returns the source text \(all equalities and deletions\).

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffText2"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffText2](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L1193>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffText2(diffs []Diff) string
```

DiffText2 computes and returns the destination text \(all equalities and insertions\).

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffToDelta"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffToDelta](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L1230>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffToDelta(diffs []Diff) string
```

DiffToDelta crushes the diff into an encoded string which describes the operations required to transform text1 into text2. E.g. =3\\t\-2\\t\+ing \-\> Keep 3 chars, delete 2 chars, insert 'ing'. Operations are tab\-separated. Inserted text is escaped using %xx notation.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.DiffXIndex"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [DiffXIndex](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L1085>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) DiffXIndex(diffs []Diff, loc int) int
```

DiffXIndex returns the equivalent location in s2.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.MatchAlphabet"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [MatchAlphabet](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/match.go#L143>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) MatchAlphabet(pattern string) map[byte]int
```

MatchAlphabet initialises the alphabet for the Bitap algorithm.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.MatchBitap"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [MatchBitap](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/match.go#L37>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) MatchBitap(text, pattern string, loc int) int
```

MatchBitap locates the best instance of 'pattern' in 'text' near 'loc' using the Bitap algorithm. Returns \-1 if no match was found.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.MatchMain"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [MatchMain](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/match.go#L17>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) MatchMain(text, pattern string, loc int) int
```

MatchMain locates the best instance of 'pattern' in 'text' near 'loc'. Returns \-1 if no match found.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.PatchAddContext"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [PatchAddContext](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/patch.go#L74>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) PatchAddContext(patch Patch, text string) Patch
```

PatchAddContext increases the context until it is unique, but doesn't let the pattern expand beyond MatchMaxBits.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.PatchAddPadding"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [PatchAddPadding](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/patch.go#L323>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) PatchAddPadding(patches []Patch) string
```

PatchAddPadding adds some padding on text start and end so that edges can match something. Intended to be called only from within patchApply.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.PatchApply"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [PatchApply](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/patch.go#L232>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) PatchApply(patches []Patch, text string) (string, []bool)
```

PatchApply merges a set of patches onto the text. Returns a patched text, as well as an array of true/false values indicating which patches were applied.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.PatchDeepCopy"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [PatchDeepCopy](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/patch.go#L212>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) PatchDeepCopy(patches []Patch) []Patch
```

PatchDeepCopy returns an array that is identical to a given an array of patches.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.PatchFromText"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [PatchFromText](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/patch.go#L478>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) PatchFromText(textline string) ([]Patch, error)
```

PatchFromText parses a textual representation of patches and returns a List of Patch objects.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.PatchMake"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [PatchMake](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/patch.go#L115>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) PatchMake(opt ...interface{}) []Patch
```

PatchMake computes a list of patches.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.PatchSplitMax"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [PatchSplitMax](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/patch.go#L375>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) PatchSplitMax(patches []Patch) []Patch
```

PatchSplitMax looks through the patches and breaks up any which are longer than the maximum limit of the match algorithm. Intended to be called only from within patchApply.

<a name="DiffMatchPatch.PatchToText"></a>

### func \(\*DiffMatchPatch\) [PatchToText](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/patch.go#L469>)

```go
func (dmp *DiffMatchPatch) PatchToText(patches []Patch) string
```

PatchToText takes a list of patches and returns a textual representation.

<a name="Operation"></a>

## type [Operation](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/diff.go#L26>)

Operation defines the operation of a diff item.

```go
type Operation int8
```

<a name="DiffDelete"></a>

```go
const (
    // DiffDelete item represents a delete diff.
    DiffDelete Operation = -1
    // DiffInsert item represents an insert diff.
    DiffInsert Operation = 1
    // DiffEqual item represents an equal diff.
    DiffEqual Operation = 0
)
```

<a name="Operation.String"></a>

### func \(Operation\) [String](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/operation_string.go#L11>)

```go
func (i Operation) String() string
```

<a name="Patch"></a>

## type [Patch](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/patch.go#L22-L28>)

Patch represents one patch operation.

```go
type Patch struct {
    Start1  int
    Start2  int
    Length1 int
    Length2 int
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="Patch.String"></a>

### func \(\*Patch\) [String](<https://github.com/sergi/go-diff/blob/master/diffmatchpatch/patch.go#L33>)

```go
func (p *Patch) String() string
```

String emulates GNU diff's format. Header: @@ \-382,8 \+481,9 @@ Indices are printed as 1\-based, not 0\-based.

# date

```go
import "github.com/sergi/go-diff/testdata"
```

<a name="EtcUTC"></a>

```go
const (
    EtcUTC                   = 0   // Etc/UTC
    EuropeLondon             = 1   // Europe/London
    EuropeDublin             = 2   // Europe/Dublin
    PacificHonolulu          = 3   // Pacific/Honolulu
    Afghanistan              = 0   // Afghanistan
    Africa_Central           = 1   // Africa_Central
    Africa_Eastern           = 2   // Africa_Eastern

    Africa_Western           = 4   // Africa_Western
```
